text.title: Cost-Model Spreadsheet Template Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example demonstrating the procedure and output contract.

example.title: Multi-AZ ECS Fargate + RDS PostgreSQL on AWS us-east-1
example.code: Architecture: 4 ECS Fargate tasks (0.5 vCPU, 1GB), RDS PostgreSQL db.m5.large multi-AZ, S3 bucket for assets, CloudFront, ALB. Volume assumptions: 50 req/sec average, 200 req/sec peak. Categories: Compute=$280/mo, Storage=$95/mo (RDS + S3 + backups), Network=$120/mo (NAT $32 + egress $54 + ALB $22), Operations=$60/mo (CloudWatch logs/metrics + KMS), Buffer 12% = $67. Total: $622/mo. Scenarios: Conservative=$311, Expected=$622, Aggressive=$1244. Sourced from AWS pricing 2026-05-01.
example.note: Every required field populated; rationale cites at least one input by name; owner is a single named handle; version + last_reviewed present.
